series.age_note: Recommended 6+ - Fantasy adventure with dragons, mild action scenes and Vikings
series.curator_notes: Split from Dragons Hörspiel. These are episodes from 'Dragons: Rescue Riders' (Die jungen Drachenretter), a separate spin-off series for younger children featuring different characters (Schnubbel and Leyla) and a different setting. The albums have 'Das Original-Hörspiel zur Serie' in the title (without 'TV'), released from 2021-2024, distinct from the main 'Dragons' TV series (2014-2019) with 'zur TV-Serie' in titles.
